item.title: CVE-2026-48907 - CVE-2026-48907 - 未命名漏洞
item.description:
严重程度: Unknown
发布日期: Unknown
来源: Unknown
描述: 暂无详细描述
相关PoC:
CVE-2026-48907: CVE-2026-48907 is a CVSS 10.0 pre-auth RCE in Joomla Content Editor affecting all versions ≤ 2.9.99.4. The Grayxploit team breaks down the 3-weakness chain — missing auth, no extension validation, and an unsafe upload flag — that lets attackers pop a shell in 3 HTTP requests.

item.description:
严重程度: Unknown
发布日期: Unknown
来源: Unknown
描述: 暂无详细描述
相关PoC:
CVE-2025-54424: CVE-2025-54424: 1Panel TLS client cert bypass enables RCE via forged CN 'panel_client' using a bundled scanning and exploitation tool. Affected: <= v2.0.5. 🔐
